name: matterviz
description: Visualize crystal structures and MD trajectories in VSCode

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && vite build --config vite.extension.config.ts && mkdir -p dist/src && cp -r ../../src/lib dist/src/lib/ && vite build

matterviz.theme.description: Theme for MatterViz visualizations. 'auto' follows VSCode's theme.

matterviz.auto_render.description: Automatically render supported file types (structures and trajectories) when opening them. If rendering fails, falls back to regular editor.

matterviz.open_beside.description: Open MatterViz viewer beside the current editor instead of replacing it. When false (default), the viewer replaces the active tab.

matterviz.color_scheme.description: Color scheme for atoms and bonds

matterviz.background_opacity.description: Opacity of the background (0.0 = transparent, 1.0 = opaque)

matterviz.symmetry.symprec.description: Symmetry precision tolerance for spacegroup detection

matterviz.structure.atom_radius.description: Radius multiplier for atoms (0.7 = standard atomic radii)

matterviz.structure.same_size_atoms.description: Render all atoms with the same size regardless of element

matterviz.structure.show_image_atoms.description: Show atoms on the edge of the cell that are not part of the primitive basis

matterviz.structure.sphere_segments.description: Number of segments for sphere rendering (higher = smoother)

matterviz.structure.bond_thickness.description: Thickness of bonds relative to atom radius

matterviz.structure.auto_bond_order.description: Automatically perceive double/triple/aromatic bonds from geometry (main-group/organic; metals fall back to single)

matterviz.structure.aromatic_display.description: How to render perceived aromatic rings

matterviz.structure.show_bonds.description: When to display bonds between atoms

matterviz.structure.bonding_strategy.description: Method for determining bonds between atoms

matterviz.structure.show_polyhedra.description: When to render coordination polyhedra around cation-like centers

matterviz.structure.polyhedra_show_edges.description: Draw outlines along coordination polyhedra edges

matterviz.structure.polyhedra_edge_color.description: Color of coordination polyhedra edge lines

matterviz.structure.polyhedra_color_mode.description: Color polyhedra by the atoms at their corners, the center atom, or a single custom color

matterviz.structure.polyhedra_color.description: Custom polyhedra color (used when color mode is Custom Color)

matterviz.structure.polyhedra_hide_cente.description: Hide the central atom of each rendered polyhedron

matterviz.structure.polyhedra_min_neighb.description: Minimum number of bonded neighbors (coordination number) to form a polyhedron

matterviz.structure.polyhedra_max_neighb.description: Maximum number of bonded neighbors for a polyhedron (skips e.g. CN-12 cuboctahedra around large A-site cations)

matterviz.structure.polyhedra_excluded_e.description: Elements excluded from acting as polyhedra centers

matterviz.structure.polyhedra_included_e.description: Elements always allowed as polyhedra centers (overrides automatic hiding of spectator cations like alkali metals and the max neighbors cap)

matterviz.structure.atom_color_mode.description: Property to use for atom coloring

matterviz.structure.atom_color_scale.description: D3 color scale for property-based coloring (e.g. interpolateViridis, interpolatePlasma)

matterviz.structure.atom_color_scale_typ.description: Color scale type for property-based coloring

matterviz.structure.show_gizmo.description: Show orientation gizmo in the corner of structure viewer

matterviz.structure.initial_zoom.description: Initial zoom level for orthographic projection (ignored for perspective)

matterviz.structure.fov.description: Field of view in degrees for perspective projection

matterviz.structure.rotation_damping.description: Camera rotation damping factor (0 = no damping, 1 = heavy damping)

matterviz.structure.rotate_speed.description: Mouse rotation sensitivity (set to 0 to disable rotation)

matterviz.structure.zoom_to_cursor.description: Zoom toward cursor position instead of scene center (double click canvas to reset camera)

matterviz.structure.max_zoom.description: Maximum zoom level (orthographic: larger = more zoomed out, perspective: larger = further away)

matterviz.structure.min_zoom.description: Minimum zoom level (orthographic: smaller = more zoomed in, perspective: smaller = closer)

matterviz.structure.auto_rotate.description: Automatic rotation speed (0 = disabled, positive = clockwise)

matterviz.structure.rotation.description: Manual rotation around X, Y, Z axes, displayed in degrees [0, 360] but normalized as radians to [-π, π] for each of [x, y, z]. Combines additively with auto-rotation when both are active.

matterviz.structure.show_site_indices.description: Show site index numbers on atoms

matterviz.structure.site_label_padding.description: Padding around atom labels in pixels

matterviz.structure.site_label_offset.description: 3D offset for atom labels [x, y, z]

matterviz.structure.ambient_light.description: Ambient light intensity (0 = dark, higher = brighter)

matterviz.structure.directional_light.description: Directional light intensity (0 = no shadows, higher = stronger shadows)

matterviz.structure.vector_configs.description: Per-key configuration for site vector layers. Keys map to site property names (e.g. force, magmom, force_DFT). Auto-populated when a structure with vector data loads.

matterviz.structure.vector_scale.description: Scale factor for site vector arrows

matterviz.structure.vector_color.description: Color for site vector arrows (used in uniform mode and as fallback)

matterviz.structure.vector_color_mode.description: How to color arrows. auto = element for force, spin-direction for magmom/spin. element = majority species color. spin_direction = red/blue by z-component. magnitude = continuous color scale by vector length. uniform = single color (vector_color).

matterviz.structure.vector_color_scale.description: D3 color scale for magnitude coloring mode

matterviz.structure.vector_normalize.description: Show all arrows at the same length (direction only). Useful for spin/magmom visualization where orientation matters but magnitude does not.

matterviz.structure.vector_uniform_thick.description: Use the same shaft and head size for all arrows regardless of length. When off (default), thickness scales with arrow length.

matterviz.structure.vector_origin_gap.description: Fraction of visual atom radius to offset each arrow origin when multiple vectors are shown per site. 0 = all from atom center, 0.5 = halfway to surface.

matterviz.structure.vector_shaft_radius.description: Radius of vector shaft (negative = relative to length, positive = absolute)

matterviz.structure.vector_arrow_head_ra.description: Radius of vector arrow head (negative = relative to length, positive = absolute)

matterviz.structure.vector_arrow_head_le.description: Length of vector arrow head (negative = relative to length, positive = absolute)

matterviz.trajectory.auto_play.description: Automatically start playing trajectory when opened

matterviz.trajectory.fps.description: Frames per second for trajectory playback

matterviz.trajectory.fps_range.description: Allowed range for playback speed [min, max]

matterviz.trajectory.step_labels.description: Number of frame labels to display

matterviz.trajectory.bin_file_threshold.description: File size threshold for binary loading (bytes)

matterviz.trajectory.text_file_threshold.description: File size threshold for text loading (bytes)

matterviz.trajectory.use_indexing.description: Use frame indexing for large trajectories

matterviz.trajectory.chunk_size.description: Number of frames to process at once

matterviz.trajectory.step_label_format.description: Number format for step labels (D3 format specifier)

matterviz.trajectory.property_value_form.description: Number format for property values (D3 format specifier)

matterviz.trajectory.tooltip_format.description: Number format for tooltips (D3 format specifier)

matterviz.trajectory.show_parsing_progre.description: Show progress indicator while parsing files

matterviz.trajectory.compact_controls.description: Use compact layout for playback controls

matterviz.trajectory.pause_on_hover.description: Pause playback when hovering over controls

matterviz.trajectory.max_frames_in_memor.description: Maximum frames to keep in memory

matterviz.trajectory.memory_usage_warnin.description: Frame count threshold for memory warnings

matterviz.trajectory.prefetch_frames.description: Number of frames to prefetch ahead

matterviz.histogram.mode.description: Histogram display mode. 'overlay' shows multiple histograms in the same plot, 'single' shows a single histogram

matterviz.histogram.bin_count.description: Number of bins for histogram plots

matterviz.box.whisker_mode.description: How whiskers are computed: 'tukey' (1.5*IQR), 'minmax' (data extremes), 'percentile' (5th/95th), or 'std' (mean ± std)

matterviz.box.box_width.description: Box width as a fraction of the category slot

matterviz.box.show_outliers.description: Show outlier points beyond the whiskers

matterviz.box.show_mean.description: Show the mean marker inside each box

matterviz.box.kind.description: Glyph to draw per series: box, violin (KDE density), or both

matterviz.box.side.description: Which half of the slot a violin occupies (one-sided / split violins)

matterviz.box.violin_width.description: Violin width as a fraction of the category slot

matterviz.box.violin_box_width.description: Inner box width (fraction of slot) when a box is drawn inside a violin

matterviz.box.whisker.cap_fraction.description: Whisker cap width as a fraction of the box width

matterviz.sankey.orientation.description: Flow direction of the Sankey diagram

matterviz.sankey.node_align.description: How nodes are aligned across columns (maps to d3-sankey alignment)

matterviz.sankey.node_padding.description: Vertical gap in pixels between nodes sharing a column

matterviz.sankey.show_node_labels.description: Show node labels next to each node

matterviz.sankey.iterations.description: Number of d3-sankey relaxation iterations for node positioning

matterviz.sunburst.shape.description: Chart geometry: polar rings (sunburst) or stacked rows (icicle)

matterviz.sunburst.value_mode.description: How node values are interpreted (plotly branchvalues semantics): leaf-sum ignores parent values, total treats every value as authoritative, remainder adds a node's own value on top of its children

matterviz.sunburst.max_depth.description: Number of rings shown below the current zoom root (0 = all)

matterviz.sunburst.inner_radius.description: Center hole size as fraction of the outer radius

matterviz.sunburst.pad_angle.description: Angular gap in degrees between sibling arcs

matterviz.sunburst.min_fraction.description: Group sibling arcs smaller than this fraction of the total into one 'Other' slice per parent (0 = off)

matterviz.sunburst.show_labels.description: Show labels on arcs large enough to fit them

matterviz.sunburst.label_rotation.description: Arc label orientation (auto picks radial/tangential per arc)

matterviz.sunburst.label_text.description: What arc labels display (percent is of the root total)

matterviz.sunburst.zoom_on_click.description: Clicking a branch arc zooms into that subtree (center circle zooms out)

matterviz.sunburst.show_breadcrumbs.description: Show a clickable trail of ancestors when zoomed into a subtree

matterviz.scatter.symbol_type.description: Default symbol type for scatter plots

matterviz.scatter.show_lines.description: Show connecting lines in scatter plots

matterviz.scatter.point.color.description: Default color for scatter plot points

matterviz.scatter.point.stroke_width.description: Stroke width for scatter plot points

matterviz.scatter.point.stroke_color.description: Stroke color for scatter plot points

matterviz.scatter.point.stroke_opacity.description: Stroke opacity for scatter plot points

matterviz.scatter.line.width.description: Line width for scatter plot connections

matterviz.scatter.line.color.description: Default color for scatter plot lines

matterviz.scatter.line.dash.description: Line dash pattern for scatter plots (e.g. "4,4" for dashed)

matterviz.plot.animation_duration.description: Duration of plot animations in milliseconds

matterviz.plot.auto_fit_range.description: Automatically fit plot range to data

matterviz.plot.x_format.description: Number format for X-axis ticks (D3 format specifier)

matterviz.plot.x2_format.description: Number format for secondary X-axis ticks (D3 format specifier)

matterviz.plot.y_format.description: Number format for Y-axis ticks (D3 format specifier)

matterviz.plot.y2_format.description: Number format for secondary Y-axis ticks (D3 format specifier)

matterviz.convex_hull.binary.camera_zoom.description: Initial zoom for binary (2D) convex hull

matterviz.convex_hull.binary.camera_cent.description: Initial X center for binary (2D) convex hull
Initial Y center for binary (2D) convex hull

matterviz.convex_hull.binary.color_mode.description: Color mode for 2D convex hull points

matterviz.convex_hull.binary.color_scale.description: D3 interpolate color scale for 2D convex hull energy mode

matterviz.convex_hull.binary.show_stable.description: Show stable phases in 2D convex hull

matterviz.convex_hull.binary.show_unstab.description: Show unstable phases in 2D convex hull

matterviz.convex_hull.binary.show_stable.description: Show labels for stable phases in 2D convex hull

matterviz.convex_hull.binary.show_unstab.description: Show labels for unstable phases in 2D convex hull

matterviz.convex_hull.binary.max_hull_di.description: Max eV/atom above hull for showing unstable entries in 2D convex hull
Max eV/atom above hull for labeling unstable entries in 2D convex hull

matterviz.convex_hull.binary.fullscreen.description: Start in fullscreen for 2D convex hull

matterviz.convex_hull.binary.info_pane_o.description: Info pane open by default for 2D convex hull

matterviz.convex_hull.binary.legend_pane.description: Legend pane open by default for 2D convex hull

matterviz.convex_hull.ternary.camera_ele.description: Initial camera elevation (deg) for ternary (3D) convex hull

matterviz.convex_hull.ternary.camera_azi.description: Initial camera azimuth (deg) for ternary (3D) convex hull

matterviz.convex_hull.ternary.camera_zoo.description: Initial camera zoom for ternary (3D) convex hull

matterviz.convex_hull.ternary.camera_cen.description: Initial X center for ternary (3D) convex hull
Initial Y center for ternary (3D) convex hull

matterviz.convex_hull.ternary.color_mode.description: Color mode for 3D convex hull points

matterviz.convex_hull.ternary.color_scal.description: D3 interpolate color scale for 3D convex hull energy mode

matterviz.convex_hull.ternary.show_stabl.description: Show stable phases in 3D convex hull

matterviz.convex_hull.ternary.show_unsta.description: Show unstable phases in 3D convex hull

matterviz.convex_hull.ternary.show_stabl.description: Show labels for stable phases in 3D convex hull

matterviz.convex_hull.ternary.show_unsta.description: Show labels for unstable phases in 3D convex hull

matterviz.convex_hull.ternary.max_hull_d.description: Max eV/atom above hull for showing unstable entries in 3D convex hull
Max eV/atom above hull for labeling unstable entries in 3D convex hull

matterviz.convex_hull.ternary.show_hull_.description: Render lower hull faces in 3D convex hull

matterviz.convex_hull.ternary.hull_face_.description: Color for lower hull faces in 3D convex hull
Opacity for hull faces in 3D convex hull (0-1)
Coloring mode for hull faces: uniform (single color), formation_energy (by E_form), dominant_element (by element), or facet_index (categorical)

matterviz.convex_hull.ternary.fullscreen.description: Start in fullscreen for 3D convex hull

matterviz.convex_hull.ternary.info_pane_.description: Info pane open by default for 3D convex hull

matterviz.convex_hull.ternary.legend_pan.description: Legend pane open by default for 3D convex hull

matterviz.convex_hull.quaternary.camera_.description: Initial camera X rotation (rad) for quaternary (4D) convex hull
Initial camera Y rotation (rad) for quaternary (4D) convex hull
Initial camera zoom for quaternary (4D) convex hull
Initial X center for quaternary (4D) convex hull
Initial Y center for quaternary (4D) convex hull

matterviz.convex_hull.quaternary.color_m.description: Color mode for 4D convex hull points

matterviz.convex_hull.quaternary.color_s.description: D3 interpolate color scale for 4D convex hull energy mode

matterviz.convex_hull.quaternary.show_st.description: Show stable phases in 4D convex hull

matterviz.convex_hull.quaternary.show_un.description: Show unstable phases in 4D convex hull

matterviz.convex_hull.quaternary.show_st.description: Show labels for stable phases in 4D convex hull

matterviz.convex_hull.quaternary.show_un.description: Show labels for unstable phases in 4D convex hull

matterviz.convex_hull.quaternary.show_hu.description: Show convex hull faces in 4D convex hull

matterviz.convex_hull.quaternary.hull_fa.description: Color for hull faces in 4D convex hull
Opacity for hull faces in 4D convex hull (0-1)
Coloring mode for hull faces: uniform (single color), formation_energy (by E_form), dominant_element (by element), or facet_index (categorical)

matterviz.convex_hull.quaternary.max_hul.description: Max eV/atom above hull for showing unstable entries in 4D convex hull
Max eV/atom above hull for labeling unstable entries in 4D convex hull

matterviz.convex_hull.quaternary.fullscr.description: Start in fullscreen for 4D convex hull

matterviz.convex_hull.quaternary.info_pa.description: Info pane open by default for 4D convex hull

matterviz.convex_hull.quaternary.legend_.description: Legend pane open by default for 4D convex hull
